name: pie-chart
title: Basic Pie Chart
subtitle: Pie charts are mainly used to show the proportion of several categories compared with the total. The radians represent the proportion of each category.

name: scatter-chart
title: Basic Scatter Chart
subtitle: Scatter charts are used to show the relationship between two variables. Each point represents a pair of values.

content.description: The config of the scatter chart is similar to the line chart and bar chart. We just need to change the type in series to scatter. In this way, we can get a simple scatter chart.

name: candlestick-chart
title: Basic Candlestick Chart
subtitle: Candlestick charts are used to show the price movement of a financial instrument over time. Each candlestick represents the open, high, low, and close prices for a specific period.

content.description: The config of the candlestick chart is not completely the same as the line chart and bar chart. There is no need to configure the axis, but we need to set the min and max values in series to define the range of the candlestick chart.

name: radar-chart
title: Basic Radar Chart
subtitle: Radar charts are used to show the performance of multiple variables in a single chart. Each axis represents a variable, and the distance from the center represents the value of each variable.

content.description: The config of the radar chart is not completely the same as the line chart and bar chart. There is no need to configure the axis, but we need to set the shape in series to radar to define the type of the chart.

name: boxplot-chart
title: Basic Boxplot Chart
subtitle: Boxplot charts are used to show the distribution of a dataset. The box represents the interquartile range, the line inside the box represents the median, and the whiskers represent the minimum and maximum values.

content.description: The config of the boxplot chart is not completely the same as the line chart and bar chart. There is no need to configure the axis, but we need to set the shape in series to boxplot to define the type of the chart.

name: heatmap-chart
title: Basic Heatmap Chart
subtitle: Heatmap charts are used to show the relationship between two variables in a matrix format. The color of each cell represents the value of the relationship between the two variables.

content.description: The config of the heatmap chart is not completely the same as the line chart and bar chart. There is no need to configure the axis, but we need to set the shape in series to heatmap to define the type of the chart.

name: treemap-chart
title: Treemap Chart
subtitle: Treemap charts are used to show hierarchical data using nested rectangles. Each branch of the hierarchy is represented by a rectangle, and each sub-branch is represented by a smaller rectangle inside the parent rectangle. The size of each rectangle is proportional to the value of the data.

A parallel chart is a standardized way of displaying the distribution of data based on a five number summary: minimum, first quartile (Q1), median, third quartile (Q3), and maximum. The box represents the interquartile range (IQR) of the data, which is the range between the first quartile (Q1) and the third quartile (Q3). The line inside the box represents the median of the data, and the whiskers represent the minimum and maximum values of the data.
